title: Office of Outreach - Museum GiftShop Memo
body:
GiftShop Products:
UltraMersion Basketballs - Selling well despite lack of available courts and hoops within the city. Perhaps this is something to bring up for future development research? 25 units on hand.
Swords & Spiders - We can’t seem to keep any Sword&Spiders blind boxes in stock, they keep selling out and are proving difficult to come by. Perhaps we should open an exhibit for the game?
Apollo Toys - People keep asking if they can purchase the BIG Apollo figure, so there should be an official inquiry into a possible limited run of the light probe god statues?
NoodleDog - The noodly foam swords are absolutely our number one seller, however there are rumors of a recall on the product due to a very rare bug where the safety sword can become an unstoppable destructive weapon. We haven’t seen anything like that happen with our stock but the concern is still there.
- Steve!
‎
